guardrails.title: No Weakening Security
guardrails.body: Changes that weaken security are prohibited. Authentication, authorization, and validation strength shall be maintained during refactoring.

guardrails.title: No Unnecessary Indirection
guardrails.body: Avoid extracting functions called from only one place, or assigning values to variables that could be used directly. Unnecessary indirection harms code readability.

guardrails.title: Spec Includes Design Rationale
guardrails.body: The spec shall include the implementation structure (processing direction, data flow, separation of responsibilities) and the rationale for choosing that structure.
